label: Acknowledge Revision Mismatch
description: Allows a user to continue with a non-ideal UCP and LAY revision pair
notes: Used when mismatch is warning-level and acknowledgement is allowed

label: Override Revision Mismatch Role Requirement
description: Allows delegated non-Team-Lead override of revision mismatch continuation

label: Upload Revision Replacement File
description: Allows upload of a replacement file when a revision pair is incomplete or mismatched
notes: Used during intake and revision correction

label: Create Project From Fallback Revision Pair
description: Allows project creation from a fallback revision pair when engineering files do not match exactly

label: Create Unit From Fallback Revision Pair
description: Allows unit creation from a fallback revision pair

label: Change Unit Revision After Start
description: Allows a started unit to move to a new revision set for rework or green changes

label: Create Green Change Assignments
description: Allows revision delta assignment creation after a revision update

label: Acknowledge Wire Validation Warnings
description: Allows acknowledgement of warning-level validation findings

label: Dismiss Wire Validation Modal
description: Allows dismissal of the validation modal after review
